title: Simply Paxels
description: Adds simple paxels to free up your inventory. No added nonsense.
body:
# Paxels?
Paxels are block-breaking tools that do the work of Pickaxes, Axes, & Shovels. In this mod Hoes, too.
![Paxel Block Breaking Showcase](https://media.giphy.com/media/xj2uX9XYn9ahZGubwR/giphy.gif)

# Requirements?
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

# Alpha?
Well fully playable there's still features I want to add, here's a *to-do*:
 - Proper support for enchants
 - Tool-right-click interactions with blocks (hoe + dirt)
 - When crafting a Paxel allow tools to be in any order & damaged

# Q&A
### Mod Support?
None currently, make an *issue* for the mod you want supported

### Discord?/Source code/I have an *issue!*
<- Side panel, "External resources" ->

### Forge/Backport?
Probably not, I mainly play Fabric 1.18.2.
Not sure about 1.19.2.

### Curse Forge?
Nope, Modrinth is better at mod-hosting literally everywhere.

### I want upgradeable paxels!
Then check out this mod, [Piercing Paxels](https://modrinth.com/mod/piercing-paxels)
